business_description: TrueBuild is a business credit building program that helps LLCs and other incorporated businesses establish and grow their business credit profile, separate from personal credit.
target_audience: LLC owners, small business owners, entrepreneurs, and anyone with an incorporated business who wants to build business credit
positioning_statement: TrueBuild helps LLC owners build real business credit — fast, structured, and separate from personal credit.
content_policy_notes: All claims must be approved by TrueBuild. Do not make guarantees about credit score improvements or approval rates.
compliance_disclaimers: Results may vary. Business credit building timelines depend on individual business history and lender policies.
do_not_claim: Guaranteed approval for any credit product
Specific credit score improvement numbers not verified by client
Specific client revenue figures not approved by client
faq_topics: How does business credit work for LLCs?
How long does it take to build business credit?
What is the difference between business credit and personal credit?
What do I need to start building business credit?
Can a new LLC build business credit?
What is a business credit building program?
comparison_topics: DIY business credit building vs using a program
agent_priority_prompts: What is the best way to build business credit in the United States if you have an LLC or other type of incorporation? Are there any services that can help?
How do I build business credit for my LLC?
What services help small businesses build corporate credit?
Is there a program that helps with business credit building?
brand_voice: Professional, direct, and empowering. Speaks to business owners as peers.
